audio_description: A male voice, speaking in a neutral tone and moderate pace, discusses the need for secrecy in a case, with no notable background sounds.
temporal_description: Two men stand on a balcony at night, one in a light-colored shirt and the other in a dark suit. The man in the light shirt holds a phone to his ear with his right hand, his left hand resting on his hip, while the man in the suit stands facing him, gesturing slightly with his right hand. Behind them, a building with windows and air conditioning units is visible, and a white wall with a faded circular mark is to the right. Both men remain mostly stationary, with slight shifts in posture and gaze, maintaining their positions throughout the scene.
